title: CN_25w14Craftmine++
description: 这是一个为愚人节快照 25w14craftmine 定制的趣味光影整合包，包含兼容性修复与性能优化。 This is a "25w14craftmine" Fun-Oriented Shader Modpack designed for the April Fools' snapshot, focusing on compatibility fixes and performance optimizations.
body:
### **项目描述 / Project Description** 这是一个为愚人节快照 **25w14craftmine** 定制的趣味光影整合包，包含兼容性修复与性能优化。所有覆盖文件均已标注来源与修改原因。 This is a **"25w14craftmine" Fun-Oriented Shader Modpack** designed for the April Fools' snapshot, focusing on compatibility fixes and performance optimizations. All overrides include clear sources and modification reasons. --- #### **1. 优化类模组（兼容性修改） / Optimization Mods (Compatibility Adjustments)** - **钠（Sodium）** - Modrinth 原版：[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) Original Modrinth version - 来源：为 25w14craftmine 定制的分支 Source: Custom fork for 25w14craftmine - [IMS212/sodium-fabric@april](https://github.com/IMS212/sodium-fabric/tree/april) - [Lonmo0208/Sodium@Sodium-25w14Cratfmine](https://github.com/Lonmo0208/Sodium/tree/Sodium-25w14Cratfmine!) - **钠额外（Sodium Extra）** - Modrinth 原版：[Sodium-Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/Sodium-Extra) Original Modrinth version - 来源：为 25w14craftmine 适配的分支 Source: Fork for 25w14craftmine - [Lonmo/sodium-extra@25w14CraftMine](https://gitee.com/Lonmo/sodium-extra/tree/25w14CraftMine/) - 修改内容：仅修复兼容性问题，未改动功能 Changes: Pure compatibility fixes, no functional alterations. - **锂（Lithium）** - Modrinth 原版：[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/Lithium) Original Modrinth version - 来源：为 25w14craftmine 适配的分支 Source: Fork for 25w14craftmine - [Lonmo0208/lithium](https://github.com/Lonmo0208/lithium) - 修改内容：仅修复兼容性问题，未改动功能 Changes: Pure compatibility fixes, no functional alterations. - **Iris 光影** - Modrinth 原版：[Iris-Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/Iris) Original Modrinth version - 来源：混合分支（含异步加载优化） Source: Hybrid fork with async loading - [IrisShaders/Iris@craftmine](https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris/tree/craftmine) - [Lonmo0208/Iris@25w14Craftmine-Async](https://github.com/Lonmo0208/Iris/tree/25w14Craftmine-Async) - 修改内容：集成光影材质异步加载（代码由我原创贡献，参考自 Neoculus） Changes: Integrated **asynchronous resource loading** (original code contribution by me, inspired by [Neoculus](https://github.com/Yuqi154/NeOculus/blob/1.21.1/src/main/java/net/irisshaders/iris/shaderpack/ShaderPack.java)). --- #### **2. BUG 修复模组 / Bug Fix Mods** - **Craftmine Fixes** - Modrinth 原版：[25w14craftmine-Bug-Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftmine-fixes) Original Modrinth version - 覆盖原因：使用 GitHub 最新构建以修复更多问题 Override Reason: Latest GitHub build resolves unfixed issues - 来源：[zly2006/25w14craftmine-Bug-Fixes](https://github.com/zly2006/25w14craftmine-Bug-Fixes) - 许可证：LGPL-3.0（[查看协议](https://github.com/zly2006/25w14craftmine-Bug-Fixes?tab=LGPL-3.0-1-ov-file)） License: LGPL-3.0 - **其他 BUG 修复模组** - **CraftMine Biome Fix** & **CraftMineFix** - 修改原因：针对 25w14craftmine 的特定错误修复 Reason: Specific bug fixes for 25w14craftmine --- #### **3. 功能性模组（需版本适配） / Functional Mods (Version Adjustments Required)** - **更好的 F3（BetterF3）** - Modrinth 原版：[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/BetterF3) Original Modrinth version - 来源：为 25w14craftmine 适配的分支 Source: Fork for 25w14craftmine - [Lonmo0208/BetterF3](https://github.com/Lonmo0208/BetterF3) - 修改内容：仅修复兼容性问题，未改动功能 Changes: Pure compatibility fixes, no functional alterations. - **生物血量显示（TslatEntityStatus）** - Modrinth 原版：[TslatEntityStatus](https://modrinth.com/mod/TslatEntityStatus) Original Modrinth version - 来源：为 25w14craftmine 适配的分支 Source: Fork for 25w14craftmine - [Lonmo0208/TslatEntityStatus@25w14craftmine](https://github.com/Lonmo0208/TslatEntityStatus/tree/25w14craftmine) - 修改内容：仅修复兼容性问题，未改动功能 Changes: Pure compatibility fixes, no functional alterations. - 前置模组修改： Dependency modifications: - **Architectury**（原 Modrinth：[链接](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)） Adjusted version checks in `fabric.mod.json`. - **ForgeConfigAPIPort**（原 Modrinth：[链接](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)） Adjusted version checks in `fabric.mod.json`. - 覆盖原因：修改版本检测逻辑 Override Reason: Adjusted version checks in `fabric.mod.json`. - **FallingTree（伐树模组）** - Modrinth 原版：[FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) Original Modrinth version - 覆盖原因：修改版本检测逻辑 Override Reason: Adjusted version checks in `fabric.mod.json`. --- #### **4. 第三方模组 / Third-Party Mods** - **TechReborn（科技复兴）** - 来源：CurseForge Source: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn) - 许可协议：MIT（[查看协议](https://github.com/TechReborn/TechReborn/tree/1.20?tab=License-1-ov-file)） License: MIT --- #### **5. 其他覆盖模组（来自 Modrinth 的修改版本） / Additional Overrides (Modified Modrinth Mods)** - **覆盖原因**：部分模组原生于 Modrinth，但因需适配 **25w14craftmine** 的特殊版本，仅修改了 "fabric.mod.json" 中的 Minecraft 版本标识符，未更改任何功能代码。由于技术限制，无法逐一列出所有相关模组，但它们均可在 Modrinth 平台找到原始版本。 **Override Reason**: Some mods originally hosted on Modrinth require adjustments to the Minecraft version identifiers in "fabric.mod.json" for compatibility with **25w14craftmine**, with **no functional code modified**. Specific mod names cannot be fully listed due to technical constraints, but all original versions are publicly available on Modrinth. - **示例模组 / Example Mods**： | 模组名称 / Mod Name | 原 Modrinth 链接 / Original Modrinth Link | 修改内容 / Changes | |---------------------|------------------------------------------|--------------------| | Architectury | [链接](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) | 调整版本标识符
Adjusted version identifiers | | FallingTree | [链接](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) | 调整版本标识符
Adjusted version identifiers | --- ### **多版本支持说明 / Multi-Version Support Notes** - **部分模组兼容性**： - 部分适用于 Minecraft **1.21.5** 的 Fabric/NeoForge 模组可与 **25w14craftmine** 兼容，但需根据加载器类型调整配置文件。 - Partial Compatibility: Some mods designed for Minecraft **1.21.5** (Fabric/NeoForge) are compatible with **25w14craftmine**, but require configuration adjustments based on the loader. - **Fabric 版本适配**： - **无需修改的模组**：若模组原生支持 **1.21.5** 且 **无需修改 `fabric.mod.json`** 即可兼容 **25w14craftmine**，且 Modrinth 平台已提供适配版本，则直接通过 Modrinth 依赖引用，**无需内嵌覆盖**。 - **需修改的模组**：若需调整 `fabric.mod.json` 中的版本标识符，则必须内嵌在覆盖文件夹中分发。 - Fabric Version Adaptation: - **Unmodified Mods**: If a mod natively supports **1.21.5** and works on **25w14craftmine** without `fabric.mod.json` changes, and a compatible version exists on Modrinth, it will be referenced via Modrinth dependencies **without embedding in overrides**. - **Modified Mods**: Mods requiring version identifier adjustments in `fabric.mod.json` must be embedded in the overrides folder. - **NeoForge 版本适配**： - 当前 **没有模组官方支持 25w14craftmine 的 NeoForge**，因此： - 若模组基于 1.21.5 NeoForge 且代码兼容 25w14craftmine，则必须修改 `neoforge.mods.toml` 中的 **NeoForge 版本标识符** 和 **Minecraft 版本标识符**，并内嵌在覆盖文件夹中分发。 - 即使模组代码兼容，仍需显式声明版本适配以避免加载错误。 - NeoForge Version Adaptation: - **No mod officially supports 25w14craftmine on NeoForge**, thus: - If a mod is built for 1.21.5 NeoForge and is code-compatible with 25w14craftmine, it must have the **NeoForge version identifier** and **Minecraft version identifier** in `neoforge.mods.toml` modified, and be embedded in the overrides folder. - Even code-compatible mods require explicit version declarations to prevent loader errors. - **示例 / Example**： ```toml # 原配置 / Original [[dependencies.modname]] modId = "minecraft" versionRange = "1.21.5" [[dependencies.modname]] modId = "neoforge" versionRange = "[21.5.61-beta,)" # 修改后 / Modified [[dependencies.modname]] modId = "minecraft" versionRange = "25w14craftmine" [[dependencies.modname]] modId = "neoforge" versionRange = "[0.25w14craftmine.5-beta,)" --- #### **6. 附加资源 / Additional Resources** - **Complementary Shaders (Reimagined) by IMS21** - **来源**：由 IMS21 在 Iris Discord 服务器发布的不稳定版本，遵循 LGPL-3.0 协议分发。 **Source**: Unstable build released by IMS21 in the Iris Discord server, distributed under LGPL-3.0. - **链接**： - [Modrinth 页面](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - [Discord 发布消息](https://discord.com/channels/774352792659820594/883067831485366304/1356710831152169242) - **许可证**： - [LGPL-3.0](https://github.com/ComplementaryDevelopment/ComplementaryReimagined/blob/main/License.txt) - 源码仓库：[ComplementaryReimagined](https://github.com/ComplementaryDevelopment/ComplementaryReimagined) - **社区汉化资源包 (Community Chinese Localization Resource Pack)** - **来源**：由社区成员提供的中文汉化资源包，可直接使用。 **Source**: Chinese localization resource pack provided by the community, ready to use. - **授权说明**： - 汉化内容基于原版资源包协议（通常为 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0），未修改原功能。 **License Note**: Localization adheres to the original resource pack's license (typically [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)), with no functional alterations. --- #### **7. 通用声明 / General Notes** - **Modrinth 原有模组**：所有修改的依赖项均来自官方 Modrinth 页面，改动仅限于版本标识符调整，未修改功能代码。 Mods with Modrinth Origins: All modified dependencies originate from official Modrinth pages. Changes are strictly limited to version identifier adjustments. - **开源合规性**：钠、锂、Iris 的分支保留原始许可（LGPL-3.0/MIT），完整代码已公开在仓库中。 Open-Source Compliance: Forks retain original licenses (LGPL-3.0/MIT). Full source code is publicly accessible. - **透明度**：所有自定义代码（如异步加载）均可在提交历史中查证。 Transparency: All custom code (e.g., async loading) is documented in commit histories.
